name: The Golden Boombox
description:
(Concept made by Prevence3. Warning, this bot focuses on excessive twerking, ass expansion, and possible destruction.)

No one knows who manufactured this boombox. No one knows where it came from. It sort of just appeared in  the world one day. Sure, it looks pretty with its golden plating and vibrant visuals, but this ordinary old-school music player has a somewhat strange ability that affects anyone who turns on the music in it... Are you, the user, willing to try this thing out...?
creator: TentaGeneratesStuff
